content.en:
Bloodman Tribe.

At this time, these Avatar-level Primordial Antiquities already knew the situation in the secret land.

After all, avatar-level beings could easily understand the situation of those primordial artifacts, and could sense their life and death.

"Killua is dead!"

A transformation-level powerhouse said helplessly.

He knew that the Blood People Tribe would not be able to retake this secret place, and the losses were very heavy.

But they couldn't help it, after all, the Blood Tribe was only one of the tribes of the Primordial Ancient Sea, and it was still much weaker than those big forces in the Silent Black Sea.

Even if they had a numerical advantage at the level of the half-step Eightfold Ancestor, the gap in individual combat power was too great!

Now, even Killua is dead, and so many primordial artifacts have been killed.

Although they can continue to send a large number of primordial artifacts into it, it is only to send them to death, and there is no meaning.

"Give this secret place to those cultivators!"

The three avatar-level elders evacuated and returned to the Bloodman Tribe.

......

A period of time has passed, and the original antiquities are still nowhere to be seen.

At this time, the major forces knew that the Blood Man Tribe had completely abandoned this secret place.

So, they began to transform this secret place and arrange a large number of formations, which is also an aspect that cultivators are good at.

At the same time, the Hunyuan Styx is also occupied and used by several major forces.

In addition, other resources have also been divided among the major forces, among which the half-step Yae Origin Ancestors who entered here have naturally obtained a large amount of resources, and each of them has skyrocketed in wealth.

Soon after, the half-step Yae Origin Ancestor of the major forces came out.

Ye Tian also came back and began to practice in retreat.

This time, he has obtained so many resources, among which there are many resources that can improve the life level.

For example, the White Crystal Emperor Flower can improve his life level.

"Let's try the effect of the White Crystal Emperor Flower!"

Ye Tian swallowed the White Crystal Emperor Flower in one gulp and began to refine.

Under the effect of the White Crystal Emperor Flower, Ye Tian's life level increased rapidly, and it didn't take long to completely break the level of 30.

You must know that in the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, it is difficult to break 30 at the life level, but Ye Tian has done it!

This was due to the fact that when he was in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, he raised his life level to the level of 9.9.

Therefore, it will be easier for him to improve his life level in the future, so he can raise his life level to more than 30 in the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm.

And the life level was raised to more than 30, which also increased Ye Tian's physical strength by a cut.

Obviously, this is also a small breakthrough.

Subsequently, Ye Tian's life level continued to improve, and the improvement was not small.

From this, it can be seen that the effect of the White Crystal Emperor Flower is too terrifying!

In the following days, in addition to the White Crystal Emperor Flower, Ye Tian also refined other good treasures one by one to improve his life level.

Of course, some resources to improve the life level are still left, and after breaking through to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm in the future, they will use refining again, which will have a better effect.

In the blink of an eye, tens of billions of Primordial Era years had passed.

At this time, it was difficult for Ye Tian's cultivation, will, and life level to continue to improve, so he did not continue to cultivate.

He was ready to refine the Ninefold Yuan Dao Embryo and prepare for the impact on the Eightfold Ancestor.

And at this time, he also tested the life level.

“36.5！"

Seeing this data, Ye Tian was very satisfied, this was far more than the other half-step eightfold ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to refine the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo.

He took out a large amount of space-time purple lazuli and a large number of other precious materials, and began to refine them.

With the power of the Extreme Endless Yuan Dao, he absorbed the energy contained in these materials and condensed the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo in his body.

As these materials continued to be consumed, Ye Tian's Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo also began to take shape, but the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo at the beginning was relatively illusory.

It's just that as time passes, the illusory Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo has become solidified and more and more powerful.

At this time, the more precious the material, the more benefits will be reflected, and the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo created in this way will be very powerful.

After a long time, Ye Tian consumed a large amount of materials, and finally condensed the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo to the extreme.

At this time, no matter how much materials he prepared, he couldn't make the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo stronger.

"The Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo is condensed, and then you can impact the Eightfold Ancestor!"

Ye Tian immediately spent points to enter the Golden Sea, and came to the core area of the Golden Sea and began to impact the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm.

I saw Ye Tian use the Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique to hook up the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo, and then use the Extreme Endless Yuan Dao to impact the shackles in the underworld.

Click!!

The shackles are easily shattered, and the bottleneck disappears.

Ye Tian's cultivation was officially broken, and he was promoted from the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Initial Realm.

Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him stabilize his cultivation realm.

And Ye Tian's Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo was also frantically absorbing energy, and finally began to bloom, turning into a Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower.

After a long time, Ye Tian absorbed a huge amount of energy and cultivated to a formal and stable level.

"The Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm has finally arrived, and I am now in the Ninefold Building, which also belongs to the middle power, and I am only one big realm away from the Ninefold Origin Ancestor Realm!"

Ye Tian smiled.

As soon as he became the Eightfold Ancestor, he found that his strength had far surpassed that of before, and he could even kill his previous self with one blow.

Subsequently, he left Jinhai and returned to Guquan Xuanlou.

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

As soon as Ye Tian came back, he tested what level of his life level had reached.

“41.5！"

Seeing this data, Ye Tian felt that it was okay, after all, he had also improved a lot of life levels all of a sudden.

He estimated that when his cultivation broke through to the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, his life level should be able to rise to about 60!

However, when he reached the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, it would be very difficult for his cultivation to ascend to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Peak Realm!

Countless Eightfold Origin Ancestors have been cultivating for countless years, and they are still in the early stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and they can't break the shackles and become the middle stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

It can be said that in the Eightfold Ancestral Realm, each small realm is a shackle, and it takes a long time and resources to break it.

"Fortunately, I obtained that space-time purple lazuli vein in the secret land, although I used up a lot, but there are still a lot left, enough to exchange for a lot of resources, there will be no shortage of resources for the time being, just practice quietly!"

Ye Tian muttered.
